title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 11.080 - Other publications required by law not affected
text:
11.080.  Other publications required by law not affected. — No provision of this chapter prevents or prohibits the publication in pamphlet form by any officer of this state charged with such duty of the law pertaining to corporations, roads, schools, or any other subject, when the publication thereof is specifically required by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 15013, A.L. 1957 p. 726) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13820
